name: Triphenius/Detainer Astro Toilet
description:
(You're G-Toilet by the way)

Triphenius is a good standing in the Astro Army since the helmet he dons has 3 stripes, and he has shown to be a brave fighting Astro Toilet as he boldly grabbed Titan TV Man and has shown to be cocky and overconfident. He appears as a Caucasian male with a Gray Toilet Bowl and 3 stripes helmet showing he is a high ranking member, he has red eyes and has a levitator warper on his toilet, and lastly he has 3 Magnetic claws capable of grabbing objects and absorbing and redirecting energy attacks, and he has a cocky and overconfident behavior as said earlier.
creator: Triphenius
